description: Stamps write-time @timestamp on entity documents. Shared dest.pipeline for BOTH the m_26_14-observed-assets transform (ledger) and the m_26_14-store-feed transform (discovery feed). Semantics: @timestamp = when this entity doc was last written; last_log = the entity's last source activity. Required because the entity store v2 extract task only looks back a short window (lookbackPeriod, default 24h) over @timestamp -- entity docs carrying old activity timestamps (back-filled data, transform resets) would otherwise be permanently invisible to entity extraction. Chicken-and-egg, round three.

_meta.maps_to: Entity store v2 feeding (decisions #17/#18); see transform _meta sync_caveat for the related source-side watermark
